packageRules.description: 7-Zip source build (winetricks) and Linux binary (base runtime) track the same upstream release

customManagers.description: Git sources: '# renovate:' comment above url + tag. The commit hash is resolved by the post-renovate CI job.
Archive/file sources where the version occurs once in the URL, right before .tar.(gz|xz|bz2). The sha256 is refreshed by the post-renovate CI job.
Archive sources marked shape=double: the version occurs twice in the URL (directory and file name); the default global auto-replace updates both occurrences.
matchStrings: # renovate: datasource=(?<datasource>\S+) depName=(?<depName>\S+)(?: packageName=(?<packageName>\S+))?(?: versioning=(?<versioning>\S+))?(?: extractVersion=(?<extractVersion>\S+))?(?: registryUrl=(?<registryUrl>\S+))? shape=double\n +url: \S+/v?(?<currentValue>\d[\d.]*)/\S+[-/]v?\d+\.[\d.]+[-.]\S+\n

customManagers.description: PyPI wheels: version bumped in the file name; the hashed URL path and sha256 are rewritten by the post-renovate CI job from the PyPI API.
7-Zip Linux binary: release tag 26.00 maps to file name 7z2600-linux-x64.tar.xz. Fields are configured here because autoReplaceStringTemplate can only reference standard upgrade fields.
krb5: the URL directory component is the version truncated to major.minor. Fields are configured here because autoReplaceStringTemplate can only reference standard upgrade fields.
